title: Nevada Disability Adjudicator Rates (NV Pay Policy 01 Classified schedule, eff 2025-07-07)
description: Nevada DETR Disability Adjudicator series with verified grade assignments and annual salary ranges: Disability Adjudicator Trainee (12.425, grade 30, $52,200-$76,609), Adjudicator I (12.426, grade 31, $54,434-$80,054), Adjudicator II (12.428, grade 32, $56,689-$83,666), Adjudicator III (12.456, grade 33, $59,257-$87,571), and Disability Adjudication Supervisor (12.457, grade 35, $64,415-$95,630). Grade assignments are from the official NV class specification; annual min(step 1)/max(step 10) figures are from the official NV Pay Policy 01 (Classified, EE/ER) compensation schedule effective July 7, 2025. The grade-32 range exactly matches an official NEATS Disability Adjudicator 3 job announcement.

columns.name: classes.<class>.pay_grade
columns.description: NV pay grade (30-35), verified from the class spec.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_min
columns.description: Annual minimum (grade step 1) on Pay Policy 01 EE/ER.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_max
columns.description: Annual maximum (grade step 10) on Pay Policy 01 EE/ER.

source.publisher: Nevada Division of Human Resource Management; NV Dept of Employment, Training and Rehabilitation (DETR) Bureau of Disability Adjudication
source.title: NV class spec 12.457 (grade mapping) + NV Pay Policy 01 Classified Compensation Schedule (EE/ER), effective 2025-07-07

notes: Authoritative: grade assignments (12.425->30, 12.426->31, 12.428->32, 12.456->33, 12.457->35) from the official NV class spec; annual min(step 1)/max(step 10) from the official NV Pay Policy 01 (Classified EE/ER) schedule eff 2025-07-07, read directly from the PDF (a naive diagonal-matrix parser mis-assigned values and was rejected; values were confirmed by direct GG-01/GG-10 row reads and cross-checked against an official NEATS grade-32 announcement = $56,689.20-$83,666.16). PAY-PLAN CAVEAT: NV also publishes EPC (lower) and CBU-specific variant schedules; Pay Policy 01 EE/ER is the standard base used here. AFSCME Local 4041 Unit C CBA (Aug 2024) exact wage effect not separately verified (cba_terms_verified false).
